/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/command_executor_node.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/command_executor_node.dir/src/command_dispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/command_executor_node.dir/src/command_executor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/command_executor_node.dir/src/command_handlers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/command_executor_node.dir/src/signal_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/command_executor_node.dir/src/status_subscriber.cpp.o CMakeFiles/command_executor_node.dir/home/radxa/oro_base/oro_base_hardware_layer/radxa_drivers/src/radxa_services.cpp.o -o command_executor_node  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: -lzmq /usr/local/lib/libstorage_handoff.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libradxa_drivers.a -lgpiod -lpthread -lpqxx -lpq
